text.title: BA Knowledge Areas Detail Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding the knowledge-areas-detail methodology. Each rule pairs a binary check + sourced rationale and is referenced from `content/06-decision-tree.xml`.

rule.rationale: Skipping or reordering this step breaks the methodology's invariants; it is the classify situation gate.

rule.statement: Step 2 (route kas): Pick KA sequence + methodology list.
rule.rationale: Skipping or reordering this step breaks the methodology's invariants; it is the route kas gate.

rule.statement: Step 3 (plan deliverables): Per-KA deliverable list with owner + due.
rule.rationale: Skipping or reordering this step breaks the methodology's invariants; it is the plan deliverables gate.

rule.statement: Step 4 (execute with handoffs): Run each KA with explicit handoff to next; loop back if validation fails.
rule.rationale: Skipping or reordering this step breaks the methodology's invariants; it is the execute with handoffs gate.

rule.statement: Step 5 (audit map): Map deliverables to evidence rows for compliance / audit.
rule.rationale: Skipping or reordering this step breaks the methodology's invariants; it is the audit map gate.

rule.statement: If preconditions for knowledge-areas-detail do not hold, do not apply this methodology; route to an alternative as the decision tree suggests.
rule.rationale: Methodologies misapplied to wrong contexts create overhead without value; explicit skip preserves the agent's budget.
